sections.title: Hero
sections.note: Title, subtitle, CTAs, bullets all match live. Tag 'L'outil des PMO modernes' correctly captured as bullet.

sections.title: Découvrez AirSaas en action
sections.note: Live has 6 tabs (Portfolio, Quarter plan, Capacitaire, Priorisation, Roadmap, Reporting) with Lottie animations as a tabbed showcase. The icon-row labels match but live has no 'Découvrez AirSaas en action' / 'Une suite complète...' heading - this title/subtitle appears fabricated.

sections.title: Stats
sections.note: All 4 stat values and labels match.

sections.title: Email Bilan de santé
sections.note: Reversed correctly set for left-aligned image variant.

sections.title: Kanban des décisions
sections.note: Live has duplicate bullet 'Owner et échéance assignés' twice; extraction de-duped to 'Statut et suivi en temps réel' which is a small fabrication, but reasonable cleanup.

sections.title: Planification trimestrielle
sections.note: Live has duplicated text 'Alignement DSI / Métiers / ComexAlignement DSI / Métiers / Comex' — extraction correctly cleaned this.

sections.title: De contremaître à coach d'organisation
sections.note: Labels combine title + description from live cards, content faithful.

sections.title: Ils parlent de nous
sections.note: Both testimonials match. Note: Alexandre F.'s LinkedIn URL points to clement-royer which mirrors live HTML (likely a live bug, faithfully reproduced).

sections.title: Sécurité au top
sections.note: Labels combine heading + sub e.g. 'ISO 27001 — Certifié', faithful to live structure.

sections.title: Prêt à devenir le PMO stratégique
sections.note: Title, subtitle, both CTA cards match live.

audit.summary: Extraction is mostly faithful. The hero, stats, pain-points, all 8 feature-splits, testimonials, trust-badges, logo bars, steps, FAQ and final CTA all match live content accurately. Two minor issues: (1) the first icon-row's title 'Découvrez AirSaas en action' and subtitle appear fabricated — live has no such heading, just a tabbed Lottie showcase with the 6 module icons; (2) the Kanban des décisions section has a small bullet substitution where live had a duplicated bullet. No sections from live are missing from the extraction.
